title: Prompt Lifecycle, Monitoring, and Production Capstone · Failure Triage
summary: Ship and maintain a cross-provider prompt system with regression evidence. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a production prompt portfolio and release gate and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Store owners, versions, model assumptions, templates, and evaluation links in a prompt registry.
Block prompt releases on material deterministic, rubric, safety, or human-review regressions.
Monitor outcome, refusal, tool, latency, cost, and drift signals without logging sensitive content unnecessarily.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Implement the cause-level repair
steps.instruction: Append a contract headed "Evidence: prompt-portfolio-defense-1eznod" with concrete Goal, Context, Constraints, Output, and Done when sections tailored to this case.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Portfolio Defense into observable performance evidence.

content.code:
Evidence: prompt-portfolio-defense-1eznod
Goal: [replace with one observable outcome]
Context: [replace with decision-relevant facts]
Constraints: [replace with authority and safety boundaries]
Output: [replace with the artifact and evidence shape]
Done when: [replace with changed-case acceptance criteria]
